scripts.tauri:dev: concurrently -n vite,sidecar,diarize,tauri -c green,blue,cyan,yellow "vite --port 5174 --strictPort" "npx tsx sidecar/rhetorical-server.ts" "node sidecar/start_diarize.cjs" "npx tauri dev"
scripts.build:gpu: node scripts/set-cargo-variant.mjs gpu && pnpm build:sidecar && npx tauri build && node scripts/rename-installer.mjs gpu
scripts.build:cpu: node scripts/set-cargo-variant.mjs cpu && pnpm build:sidecar && npx tauri build && node scripts/rename-installer.mjs cpu
scripts.build:all: pnpm build:gpu && pnpm build:cpu && pnpm build:smart
